name: KS_OFIS_NAKIT_AKIS
definition:
--USE [ISKULTUR_2020]
--GO

--/** Object:  View [dbo].[KS_OFIS_NAKIT_AKIS]    Script Date: 02/22/2024 14:36:43 **/
--SET ANSI_NULLS ON
--GO

--SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
--GO



CREATE VIEW [dbo].[KS_OFIS_NAKIT_AKIS] AS

SELECT 
CLCARD.CODE , 
CLCARD.DEFINITION_,
      
CASE PAYTRANS.MODULENR WHEN 4 THEN INVOICE.FICHENO WHEN 5 THEN CLFICHE.FICHENO WHEN 6 THEN CSROLL.ROLLNO WHEN 7 THEN BNFICHE.FICHENO WHEN 10 THEN KSLINES.FICHENO END FICHENO,
CONVERT(DATE,(CASE PAYTRANS.MODULENR WHEN 4 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN 5 THEN CLFICHE.DATE_ WHEN 6 THEN CSROLL.DATE_ WHEN 7 THEN BNFICHE.DATE_ WHEN 10 THEN KSLINES.DATE_ END)) DATE_,
                
CASE PAYTRANS.MODULENR WHEN 4 THEN INVOICE_EMFICHE.FICHENO WHEN 5 THEN CLFICHE_EMFICHE.FICHENO WHEN 6 THEN CSROLL_EMFICHE.FICHENO WHEN 7 THEN BNFICHE_EMFICHE.FICHENO WHEN 10 THEN KSLINES_EMFICHE.FICHENO END MUH_FICHENO,
CONVERT(DATE,(CASE PAYTRANS.MODULENR WHEN 4 THEN INVOICE_EMFICHE.DATE_ WHEN 5 THEN CLFICHE_EMFICHE.DATE_ WHEN 6 THEN CSROLL.DATE_ WHEN 7 THEN BNFICHE_EMFICHE.DATE_ WHEN 10 THEN KSLINES_EMFICHE.DATE_ END)) MUH_DATE_,

CASE WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '120.07%' THEN 'Mağaza Para' 
 WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '335.01%' THEN 'Personel'  
 WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '336.%' THEN 'Personel'  
 WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '195.%' THEN 'Personel'  
 WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '196.%' THEN 'Personel'  
 WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '108.01%' THEN 'KKartı'    
 WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '329.%' THEN 'Şirket KKartı'  
 
 WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '159.%' THEN 'Verilen Avanslar' 
 WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '340.%' THEN 'Alınan Avanslar' 
     
 WHEN CLCARD.CODE LIKE '108.02%' THEN 'HGS' 
 
 
 ELSE   
(CASE PAYTRANS.MODULENR WHEN 4 THEN 'Fatura'
	WHEN 5 THEN 'Cari Hesap' 
	WHEN 6 THEN 'Çek-Senet' 
	WHEN 7 THEN 'Cari Hesap' 
	WHEN 10 THEN 'Kasa' 
	WHEN 61 THEN 'Çek-Senet' END) 

END TYPE,


CASE PAYTRANS.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN 'Ödemeler' WHEN 0 THEN 'Tahsilat' END AS SIGN,
PAYTRANS.TRCODE ,
CASE PAYTRANS.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN PAYTRANS.TOTAL * (-1) WHEN 0 THEN PAYTRANS.TOTAL END AS TOTAL ,
CASE WHEN  TKVM.HAFTA < DATEPART( wk, GETDATE()) THEN DATEPART( wk, GETDATE()) ELSE TKVM.HAFTA END HAFTA   ,TKVM.BAS_TAR,TKVM.BIT_TAR


FROM 
(SELECT DATEPART( wk, TAKVIM.Date) HAFTA , MIN(TAKVIM.Date) BAS_TAR , MAX(TAKVIM.Date) BIT_TAR

FROM (SELECT  TOP (DATEDIFF(DAY, CONVERT(date,'20240101'), '20241231') + 1)
        Date = DATEADD(DAY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.object_id) - 1,  CONVERT(date,'20240101'))    
FROM sys.all_objects a CROSS JOIN sys.all_objects b) TAKVIM 
--WHERE TAKVIM.Date > GETDATE()
GROUP BY DATEPART( wk, TAKVIM.Date)) TKVM
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_PAYTRANS PAYTRANS WITH(NOLOCK) ON TKVM.HAFTA = DATEPART( wk, PAYTRANS.DATE_) AND YEAR(PAYTRANS.DATE_) = 2024
INNER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK) ON CLCARD.LOGICALREF = PAYTRANS.CARDREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_INVOICE INVOICE WITH(NOLOCK) ON INVOICE.LOGICALREF = PAYTRANS.FICHEREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_EMFICHE INVOICE_EMFICHE WITH(NOLOCK) ON INVOICE.ACCFICHEREF = INVOICE_EMFICHE.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_BNFLINE BNFLINE WITH(NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.LOGICALREF = PAYTRANS.FICHEREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_BNFICHE BNFICHE WITH(NOLOCK) ON BNFICHE.LOGICALREF = BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_EMFICHE BNFICHE_EMFICHE WITH(NOLOCK) ON BNFICHE.ACCFICHEREF = BNFICHE_EMFICHE.LOGICALREF

LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_CLFLINE CLFLINE WITH(NOLOCK) ON CLFLINE.LOGICALREF = PAYTRANS.FICHEREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_CLFICHE CLFICHE WITH(NOLOCK) ON CLFICHE.LOGICALREF = CLFLINE.SOURCEFREF AND CLFICHE.TRCODE = CLFLINE.TRCODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_EMFICHE CLFICHE_EMFICHE WITH(NOLOCK) ON CLFICHE.ACCFICHEREF = CLFICHE_EMFICHE.LOGICALREF


LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_CSROLL CSROLL WITH(NOLOCK) ON CSROLL.LOGICALREF = PAYTRANS.FICHEREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_EMFICHE CSROLL_EMFICHE WITH(NOLOCK) ON CSROLL.ACCFICHEREF = CSROLL_EMFICHE.LOGICALREF


LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_KSLINES KSLINES WITH(NOLOCK) ON KSLINES.LOGICALREF = PAYTRANS.FICHEREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_EMFICHE KSLINES_EMFICHE WITH(NOLOCK) ON KSLINES.ACCFICHEREF = KSLINES_EMFICHE.LOGICALREF


WHERE PAYTRANS.CANCELLED = 0 
AND PAYTRANS.PAID = 0 AND PAYTRANS.MODULENR NOT IN (61)
AND CLCARD.CODE NOT IN ('151 VİRMANLAR','151 DEVİR','151 İŞÇİLİK')
--AND PAYTRANS.DATE_ < GETDATE()

UNION ALL


SELECT 
BNFLINE.CODE , 
BNFLINE.DEFINITION_,
      
'' FICHENO,
CONVERT(DATE,TKVM.BAS_TAR) DATE_,
                
'' MUH_FICHENO,
CONVERT(DATE,TKVM.BAS_TAR) MUH_DATE_,

'Banka' TYPE,
'Açılış Bakiye' AS SIGN,
7 TRCODE ,

SUM((ROUND(DEBIT,2)) - (ROUND(CREDIT,2))) AS TOTAL ,
CASE WHEN  TKVM.HAFTA < DATEPART( wk, GETDATE()) THEN DATEPART( wk, GETDATE()) ELSE TKVM.HAFTA END HAFTA   ,TKVM.BAS_TAR,TKVM.BIT_TAR


FROM 
(SELECT DATEPART( wk, TAKVIM.Date) HAFTA , MIN(TAKVIM.Date) BAS_TAR , MAX(TAKVIM.Date) BIT_TAR

FROM (SELECT  TOP (DATEDIFF(DAY, CONVERT(date,'20240101'), '20241231') + 1)
        Date = DATEADD(DAY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.object_id) - 1,  CONVERT(date,'20240101'))    
FROM sys.all_objects a CROSS JOIN sys.all_objects b) TAKVIM
WHERE TAKVIM.Date >= GETDATE()
 
GROUP BY DATEPART( wk, TAKVIM.Date)

) TKVM 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_BNFLINE BNFLINE WITH(NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.DATE_ < TKVM.BAS_TAR

GROUP BY BNFLINE.CODE , BNFLINE.DEFINITION_ , TKVM.HAFTA , TKVM.BAS_TAR , TKVM.BIT_TAR


UNION ALL

SELECT distinct

XXX.[CARI KODU] AS CODE, 
XXX.[CARI UNVANI] AS DEFINITION_,
CSCRD.PORTFOYNO FICHENO,
CONVERT(DATE,CSCRD.DUEDATE) AS DATE_,
'' AS MUH_FICHENO , '' AS MUH_DATE_ ,
 'Çek-Senet'  AS TYPE	,'Tahsilat' AS SIGN , 99	TRCODE ,

CSCRD.AMOUNT AS TOTAL,

CASE WHEN  TKVM.HAFTA < DATEPART( wk, GETDATE()) THEN DATEPART( wk, GETDATE()) ELSE TKVM.HAFTA END HAFTA   ,TKVM.BAS_TAR,TKVM.BIT_TAR
FROM 
(SELECT DATEPART( wk, TAKVIM.Date) HAFTA , MIN(TAKVIM.Date) BAS_TAR , MAX(TAKVIM.Date) BIT_TAR

FROM (SELECT  TOP (DATEDIFF(DAY, CONVERT(date,'20240101'), '20241231') + 1)
        Date = DATEADD(DAY, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.object_id) - 1,  CONVERT(date,'20240101'))    
FROM sys.all_objects a CROSS JOIN sys.all_objects b) TAKVIM 
--WHERE TAKVIM.Date > GETDATE()
GROUP BY DATEPART( wk, TAKVIM.Date)) TKVM
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_CSCARD CSCRD   ON TKVM.HAFTA = DATEPART( wk, CSCRD.DUEDATE) AND YEAR(CSCRD.DUEDATE) = 2024   --ON CSHTR.CSREF = CSCRD.LOGICALREF 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_CSTRANS CSHTR   WITH(NOLOCK) ON CSHTR.CSREF = CSCRD.LOGICALREF 
         
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLNTC ON CSHTR.TRCODE IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 9, 10, 11, 12) AND CSHTR.CARDREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_CSROLL RLFIC ON CSHTR.ROLLREF = RLFIC.LOGICALREF 

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT
CSCRD.LOGICALREF AS CSREF,
CSCRD.PORTFOYNO PORTFOY_NO,
CASE CSCRD.DOC
  WHEN 2 THEN 'Müşteri Senedi' 
  WHEN 1 THEN 'Müşteri Çeki'  
  WHEN 3 THEN 'Kendi Çekimiz'
    ELSE 'Borç Senedemiz' 
END as TUR, 
CSCRD.NEWSERINO SERI_NO,
CLNTC.CODE "CARI KODU", 
CLNTC.DEFINITION_ "CARI UNVANI",
CLNTC.LOGICALREF "CLREF"
FROM LG_123_01_CSCARD   CSCRD 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_CSTRANS CSHTR ON CSHTR.CSREF = CSCRD.LOGICALREF AND CSHTR.TRCODE IN (1, 2)
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLNTC ON CSHTR.CARDREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF 
                                
WHERE CSCRD.DOC IN (1,2)) XXX   ON CSCRD.LOGICALREF=XXX.CSREF

WHERE CSCRD.CURRSTAT IN (1,4) 
  --WHERE CSCRD.LOGICALREF=14

sample_data.DEFINITION_: TALİS YAPI SANAYİ VE TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ
